findings: Monitor uses mismatched counter names between telemetry and launch_proof (squad_leads_launched vs squad_leads_started; workers_launched vs workers_started).
Monitor conflates workers_completed with atoms_received fallback (semantic ambiguity: “completed workers” != “atoms received”).
workers_failed falls back to children_failed (term mismatch).
Incomplete proof warning triggers only when status==success, so it may not surface during execution; and it suppresses if workers_launched == 0 (falsy).
README describes metaswarm scaling but does not define counter fields/semantics, leaving contract implicit.
